stories.title: Sandy Alcantara Throws a Maddux — Marlins 10-0 Over White Sox

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Sandy Alcantara just threw a MADDUX — a complete game shutout in under 100 pitches. ⚾

9 IP. 3 H. 0 ER. 0 BB. 7 K. 93 pitches. Marlins win 10-0.

#BallparkBanter #Marlins #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Alcantara's scoreless streak is now 15 innings to start 2026.

His 2nd career Maddux. 13th career complete game. Miami is 5-1. The 2022 NL Cy Young winner is back. 🔥

#BallparkBanter #Marlins #Baseball

article.headline: Sandy Alcantara Throws the First Maddux of 2026 as Marlins Rout White Sox 10-0

stories.title: Dodgers "Samurai Sequence" Complete — Yamamoto Starts, Guardians Win 4-1

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The Dodgers just made history. ⚾

Three straight Japanese-born starters — Sasaki (Mon), Ohtani (Tue), Yamamoto (Wed). First time it's ever happened in MLB. Yamamoto: 6 IP, 2 ER today.

#BallparkBanter #Dodgers #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani has 22.2 consecutive scoreless innings to open 2026 — longest active streak in MLB.

He's also reached base in 36 straight games. The two-way era has fully arrived.

#BallparkBanter #Dodgers #Baseball

article.headline: Sasaki, Ohtani, Yamamoto: The Dodgers' Samurai Sequence Made MLB History

stories.title: Paul Skenes Bounces Back — 5 IP, 1 ER vs Reds After Nightmare Opener

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Paul Skenes answers after a nightmare Opening Day. ⚾

5 IP, 1 ER, 5 K vs. the Reds. Pirates win 8-3. Career ERA: 2.10 through 57 starts — 4th-best by any pitcher since 1920.

#BallparkBanter #Pirates #MLB

stories.title: The 2026 Rookie Explosion — DeLauter and Stewart Win First POTWs

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The 2026 rookie class is ALREADY historic.

Chase DeLauter: 4 HRs in his first 3 games (only the 2nd player ever). Sal Stewart: .700 BA. Both won Player of the Week. Both 2022 first-rounders.

#BallparkBanter #MLB #Baseball

stories.title: Masyn Winn Walk-Off in 11 — Cardinals Edge Mets 2-1

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Masyn Winn's first career walk-off — a bloop single in the 11th — gives the Cardinals a 2-1 win over the Mets.

The Mets were 0-for-11 with RISP in the finale. 1-for-29 in the series. 😬

#BallparkBanter #Cardinals #Mets

stories.title: Liam Hicks Has 12 RBI in 6 Games — MLB's Hottest Start

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Liam Hicks leads ALL of MLB with 12 RBI in 6 games. 🔥

Rule 5 pick. Canada's backup catcher at the WBC. 26 years old. And he is absolutely raking for the 5-1 Marlins.

#BallparkBanter #Marlins #MLB

stories.title: Early MLB Standings Snapshot — The Overachievers and the Stragglers

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Week 1 standings check: Yankees 3-0. Blue Jays 3-0. Marlins 5-1. A's 0-3. White Sox 0-6.

Baseball's early overachievers and stragglers are already making themselves known. 📊
